message:
Fix opencode connector lints and use Path over PathBuf in signatures

- Change parse_session_file() and load_messages() to accept &Path instead
  of &PathBuf for more idiomatic API (avoids unnecessary reference to owned type)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to message_id field in PartInfo since it's only
  used for deserialization, not read programmatically

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
